CustomField.formula: If(IsNull(ClosedDate), If(MOD( DateValue(CreatedDate) - DATE(1985,6,24),7)<=MOD( DateValue(Now()) - DATE(1985,6,24),7), Now() - CreatedDate - (FLOOR((DateValue(Now()) - DateValue(CreatedDate))/7)*2), Now() - CreatedDate - (FLOOR((DateValue(Now()) - DateValue(CreatedDate))/7)*2+2) ) , If(MOD( DateValue(CreatedDate) - DATE(1985,6,24),7)<=MOD( DateValue(ClosedDate) - DATE(1985,6,24),7), ClosedDate - CreatedDate - (FLOOR((DateValue(ClosedDate) - DateValue(CreatedDate))/7)*2), ClosedDate - CreatedDate - (FLOOR((DateValue(ClosedDate) - DateValue(CreatedDate))/7)*2+2) ) - CASE(MOD( DateValue(ClosedDate) - DATE(1985,6,24),7) ,5, ClosedDate - DateTimeValue(DateValue(ClosedDate)) ,6, ClosedDate - (DateTimeValue(DateValue(ClosedDate))-1) ,0) ) - CASE(MOD( DateValue(CreatedDate) - DATE(1985,6,24),7) ,5, DateTimeValue(DateValue(CreatedDate))+2-CreatedDate-2 ,6, DateTimeValue(DateValue(CreatedDate))+1-CreatedDate-2 ,0)
CustomField.label: abc
